mapper.select:
SELECT reg_dt, SUM(cnt1) AS lend_pc, SUM(cnt2) AS lend_smart FROM ( SELECT AS reg_dt, COUNT(*) cnt1, 0 cnt2 FROM
ELIB_EXTLINK_STAT a WHERE 1=1
ELIB_BOOK b WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND b.type = #{type}
AND 1=0
AND a.device = 'P'
GROUP BY
UNION ALL SELECT AS reg_dt, 0 cnt1, COUNT(*) cnt2 FROM
ELIB_EXTLINK_STAT a WHERE 1=1
ELIB_BOOK b WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx AND b.type = #{type}
AND 1=0
AND a.device = 'S'
GROUP BY
) a GROUP BY rollup(reg_dt) ORDER BY reg_dt
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt

${pagingTop} SELECT ta.member_id, CASE WHEN ta.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE ta.library_code = SUBSTR(z.homepage_code, 1, 8) AND rownum = 1) END AS library_name, NVL(tb.pcnt, 0) AS p_cnt, NVL(tb.scnt, 0) AS s_cnt, NVL(tb.acnt, 0) AS a_cnt, NVL(tb.icnt, 0) AS i_cnt, NVL(tb.ecnt, 0) AS e_cnt, NVL(tb.comments_cnt, 0) AS comments_cnt
${pagingBottom}

SELECT NVL(SUM(tb.pcnt), 0) AS p_cnt, NVL(SUM(tb.scnt), 0) AS s_cnt, NVL(SUM(tb.acnt), 0) AS a_cnt, NVL(SUM(tb.icnt), 0) AS i_cnt, NVL(SUM(tb.ecnt), 0) AS e_cnt, NVL(SUM(tb.comments_cnt), 0) AS comments_cnt

SELECT ta.member_id, CASE WHEN ta.library_code = '9999999' THEN '통합' ELSE (SELECT z.homepage_name FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE z WHERE ta.library_code = SUBSTR(z.homepage_code, 1, 8) AND rownum = 1) END AS library_name, NVL(tb.pcnt, 0) AS p_cnt, NVL(tb.scnt, 0) AS s_cnt, NVL(tb.acnt, 0) AS a_cnt, NVL(tb.icnt, 0) AS i_cnt, NVL(tb.ecnt, 0) AS e_cnt, NVL(tb.comments_cnt, 0) AS comments_cnt

SELECT TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'year'),TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a.user_birthd, 1, 4), 'YYYY'))/12, -1) AS age, SUM(NVL(b.cnt, 0)) AS lend_cnt FROM ELIB_MEMBER a, ( SELECT a.member_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ELIB_BOOK B WHERE a.book_idx = b.book_idx
AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY-MM'), 'YYYY-MM') >= TO_DATE(#{search_sdt}, 'YYYY-MM') AND TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(, 'YYYY-MM'), 'YYYY-MM') <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{search_edt}, 'YYYY-MM'))
AND 1=2
GROUP BY member_id ) b WHERE a.member_id = b.member_id AND LENGTH(a.user_birthd) >= 4 GROUP BY TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'year'),TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a.user_birthd, 1, 4), 'YYYY'))/12, -1) ORDER BY TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'year'),TO_DATE(SUBSTR(a.user_birthd, 1, 4), 'YYYY'))/12, -1)

WITH age_base AS ( SELECT '어린이' AS age_group, 1 AS ord FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '청소년', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '성인', 3 FROM dual ), member_age AS ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, CASE WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 0 AND 12 THEN '어린이' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN '청소년' ELSE '성인' END AS age_group FROM ELIB_MEMBER WHERE BIRTH_DAY IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(BIRTH_DAY, '^[0-9]{8}$') ), agg AS ( SELECT m.age_group, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '총류' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_0, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '철학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_1, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '종교' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_2, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '사회과학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_3, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('순수과학','자연과학') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_4, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '기술과학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_5, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '예술' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_6, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '언어' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_7, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '문학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_8, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '역사' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_9, COUNT(*) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM ELIB_LEND l JOIN ELIB_BOOK b ON b.BOOK_IDX = l.BOOK_IDX JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY g ON g.CATE_ID = b.PARENT_ID JOIN member_age m ON m.MEMBER_ID = l.MEMBER_ID WHERE g.DEPTH = 1 AND g.TYPE = 'EBK' AND b.TYPE = 'EBK' AND g.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND l.LEND_DT >= TO_DATE(#{search_sdt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND l.LEND_DT < TO_DATE(#{search_edt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND b.library_code = #{library_code}
GROUP BY m.age_group ) SELECT a.age_group, NVL(x.cate_0, 0) AS cate_0, NVL(x.cate_1, 0) AS cate_1, NVL(x.cate_2, 0) AS cate_2, NVL(x.cate_3, 0) AS cate_3, NVL(x.cate_4, 0) AS cate_4, NVL(x.cate_5, 0) AS cate_5, NVL(x.cate_6, 0) AS cate_6, NVL(x.cate_7, 0) AS cate_7, NVL(x.cate_8, 0) AS cate_8, NVL(x.cate_9, 0) AS cate_9, NVL(x.total_reserves_cnt, 0) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM age_base a LEFT JOIN agg x ON x.age_group = a.age_group ORDER BY a.ord

WITH age_base AS ( SELECT '어린이' AS age_group, 1 AS ord FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '청소년', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '성인', 3 FROM dual ), agg AS ( SELECT m.age_group, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '총류' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_0, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '철학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_1, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '종교' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_2, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '사회과학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_3, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('순수과학','자연과학') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_4, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '기술과학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_5, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '예술' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_6, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '언어' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_7, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '문학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_8, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '역사' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_9, COUNT(*) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM ELIB_AUDIO_STAT l JOIN ELIB_BOOK b ON b.BOOK_IDX = l.BOOK_IDX JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY g ON g.CATE_ID = b.PARENT_ID JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, CASE WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 0 AND 12 THEN '어린이' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN '청소년' ELSE '성인' END AS age_group FROM ELIB_MEMBER WHERE BIRTH_DAY IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(BIRTH_DAY, '^[0-9]{8}$') ) m ON m.MEMBER_ID = l.MEMBER_ID WHERE g.DEPTH = 1 AND g.TYPE = 'ADO' AND b.TYPE = 'ADO' AND g.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND l.reg_dt >= TO_DATE(#{search_sdt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND l.reg_dt <= TO_DATE(#{search_edt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
AND b.LIBRARY_CODE = #{library_code}
GROUP BY m.age_group ) SELECT a.age_group, NVL(x.cate_0, 0) AS cate_0, NVL(x.cate_1, 0) AS cate_1, NVL(x.cate_2, 0) AS cate_2, NVL(x.cate_3, 0) AS cate_3, NVL(x.cate_4, 0) AS cate_4, NVL(x.cate_5, 0) AS cate_5, NVL(x.cate_6, 0) AS cate_6, NVL(x.cate_7, 0) AS cate_7, NVL(x.cate_8, 0) AS cate_8, NVL(x.cate_9, 0) AS cate_9, NVL(x.total_reserves_cnt, 0) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM age_base a LEFT JOIN agg x ON x.age_group = a.age_group ORDER BY a.ord

WITH age_base AS ( SELECT '어린이' AS age_group, 1 AS ord FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '청소년', 2 FROM dual UNION ALL SELECT '성인', 3 FROM dual ), agg AS ( SELECT m.age_group, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('어린이','기타 취업/자기계발') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_0, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('철학','인문학') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_1, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '종교' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_2, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('사회과학','공무원수험') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_3, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('순수과학','자연과학') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_4, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('기술과학','기타 자격증') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_5, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '예술' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_6, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('언어','어학') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_7, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME = '문학' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_8, SUM(CASE WHEN g.CATE_NAME IN ('역사','한국사') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cate_9, COUNT(*) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM ELIB_ELEARN_STAT l JOIN ELIB_BOOK b ON b.BOOK_IDX = l.BOOK_IDX JOIN ELIB_CATEGORY g ON g.CATE_ID = b.PARENT_ID JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, CASE WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 0 AND 12 THEN '어린이' WHEN FLOOR(MONTHS_BETWEEN(SYSDATE, TO_DATE(BIRTH_DAY,'YYYYMMDD'))/12) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN '청소년' ELSE '성인' END AS age_group FROM ELIB_MEMBER WHERE BIRTH_DAY IS NOT NULL AND REGEXP_LIKE(BIRTH_DAY, '^[0-9]{8}$') ) m ON m.MEMBER_ID = l.MEMBER_ID WHERE g.DEPTH = 1 AND g.TYPE = 'WEB' AND b.TYPE = 'WEB' AND g.DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND l.REG_DT >= TO_DATE(#{search_sdt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND l.REG_DT <= TO_DATE(#{search_edt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999
AND b.LIBRARY_CODE = #{library_code}
GROUP BY m.age_group ) SELECT a.age_group, NVL(x.cate_0, 0) AS cate_0, NVL(x.cate_1, 0) AS cate_1, NVL(x.cate_2, 0) AS cate_2, NVL(x.cate_3, 0) AS cate_3, NVL(x.cate_4, 0) AS cate_4, NVL(x.cate_5, 0) AS cate_5, NVL(x.cate_6, 0) AS cate_6, NVL(x.cate_7, 0) AS cate_7, NVL(x.cate_8, 0) AS cate_8, NVL(x.cate_9, 0) AS cate_9, NVL(x.total_reserves_cnt, 0) AS total_reserves_cnt FROM age_base a LEFT JOIN agg x ON x.age_group = a.age_group ORDER BY a.ord

SELECT type, com_code, device, SUM(cnt) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT dt, lib, type, com_code, device, cnt FROM ELIB_STATICS_COMPANY_PERSONAL WHERE 1=1 UNION ALL
SELECT #{search_edt} AS dt, y.library_code AS lib, y.type, y.com_code, '-' AS device, COUNT(*) AS cnt
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS dt, y.library_code AS lib, y.type, y.com_code, '-' AS device, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM ELIB_BOOK y WHERE 1=1 AND y.type IS NOT NULL AND y.use_yn = 'Y' AND y.approved_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), y.library_code, y.type, y.com_code ) WHERE 1=1
AND #{search_sdt} <= dt
AND dt <= #{search_edt}
GROUP BY type, com_code, device
